summary: Add `lib.is_terminal_state(state) -> bool` to `.github/agent-factory/engine/lib.py` returning True for exactly "done", "failed", "blocked" and False for all other inputs (including non-strings and None). Place the helper immediately after `PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS` (line 809) where the terminal label keys already live. A new `tests/test_is_terminal_state.py` with 11 focused unit tests covers all acceptance criteria. No existing code is modified.

ledger.what: Placement in lib.py: immediately after PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS block (line 809)
ledger.why: The issue does not specify placement; the function needs a logical home near the terminal-state label definitions
ledger.what_i_did: The three terminal states are exactly the non-"setup" keys of PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS — placing the helper there makes the coupling to label definitions explicit and readable

blast_radius.why: Pure new function, zero existing lines modified

reversibility.why: Moving a function is a trivial edit with no behavioral change

ledger.revisit_if: Reviewer prefers a different placement (e.g. near decide())

ledger.what: Hardcode {"done", "failed", "blocked"} as a module-level frozenset rather than deriving dynamically from PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS
ledger.why: Issue says stdlib only, pure function; deriving from the label dict would couple the terminal-state predicate to the label rendering concern
ledger.what_i_did: Defined module-level _TERMINAL_STATES = frozenset({"done", "failed", "blocked"}) in the Phase labels section for co-location with PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS

blast_radius.why: No behavioral change to any existing code

reversibility.why: Could switch to dynamic derivation with a trivial edit

ledger.revisit_if: Reviewer prefers dynamic derivation from PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS

ledger.what: "blocked" is a genuine terminal (non-resumable) engine state
ledger.why: The issue explicitly lists it; needed to verify it corresponds to a real engine stopping condition
ledger.what_i_did: Read lib.py:803-808 (PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS) and advance.py:578-600: "blocked" is the halted.reason written when a gate with on_blocked:halt fires — the pipeline will not resume. Confirmed terminal.

reversibility.why: Removing a state from the frozenset is a trivial edit

ledger.what: "setup" must NOT be in the terminal set
ledger.why: The issue does not mention "setup"; including it would be incorrect
ledger.what_i_did: Read PHASE_LABEL_DEFAULTS:803-808: "setup" is the lifecycle label applied before any agent runs — it transitions forward, never a stopping state

reversibility.why: Adding a state to the frozenset is a trivial edit

ledger.revisit_if: Engine introduces a new meaning for "setup" as a terminal condition

ledger.why: Issue asks for focused unit tests; existing pattern is test_<concept>.py (e.g. test_decide.py for lib.decide())
ledger.what_i_did: Follow established naming pattern; dedicated file is easy to locate and keeps test_engine.py uncluttered

blast_radius.why: New file only; no existing tests modified

reversibility.why: Moving tests to another file is trivial

ledger.revisit_if: Project switches to consolidated test file style
